checks.description: Verify that Sum and Cout correspond to BCD-corrected addition of A, B, and Cin for legal BCD inputs.
checks.pass_condition: Sum equals ((A + B + Cin) % 10) and Cout equals ((A + B + Cin) >= 10) for all input combinations where A and B are in 0..9.
checks.trigger_condition: When inputs A, B, Cin are driven to any legal BCD combination.

checks.description: Guard against reliance on undocumented latency when observing boundary values.
checks.pass_condition: After inputs settle to a boundary value (0 or 9) the outputs must stabilize to a consistent value without requiring a fixed number of cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When A or B is set to 0 or 9 and Cin toggles.
